CPA1.label: Avoiding Help Due to Politics
CPA1.question: Have you ever avoided asking for help at work because you thought the person might disagree with your political views?

CPA2.label: Political Disagreement & Job Satisfaction
CPA2.question: To what extent does political disagreement at work affect your job satisfaction?

CPA3.label: Public Statements from the Private Sector
CPA3.question: Do you agree or disagree: Companies should take public positions on social issues.

CPA4.label: Public Statements By Issue
CPA4.question: Do you think businesses should or should not take a public stance on these topics?

CPA5.label: Business Impact on Society
CPA5.question: Which of the following best describes the impact businesses have on people's lives?

CPA6.label: Job Consideration Factors
CPA6.question: When considering a new job, how important would each of the following factors be in deciding which company or workplace to apply to?

subcomponents.CPA6_a: Offers fair wages to workers of all types
subcomponents.CPA6_c: Is close to where you live
subcomponents.CPA6_d: Has a commitment to promoting current employees

immigration1.label: Immigration: Good or Bad?
immigration1.question: On the whole, do you think immigration is a good thing or a bad thing for America today?

immigration2.label: Support for Deportation of Undocumented Immigrants
immigration2.question: Do you agree or disagree: immigrants currently living in the United States illegally should be deported.

immigration3.label: Support for Amnesty for Undocumented Immigrants
immigration3.question: Do you agree or disagree: undocumented immigrants currently living in the United States should be granted amnesty.

economy1.label: Economic Expectations (Next 6 Months)
economy1.question: How do you expect the economy to perform in the next 6 months?

economy2.label: Economic Performance (Past 6 Months)
economy2.question: How do you think the economy performed in the previous 6 months?

tariffs1.label: Manufacturing Jobs in America
tariffs1.question: Do you agree or disagree: America would be better off if more Americans worked in manufacturing than they do today.

tariffs2a.label: Support for New Tariffs
tariffs2a.question: Would you support or oppose the US government putting new tariffs on things made in other countries?

tariffs2b.label: Tariffs & Price Increases
tariffs2b.question: Would you support or oppose the US government putting new tariffs on things made in other countries even if it increased the price of things you buy at the store?

tariffs3.label: Effects of Free Trade Agreements
tariffs3.question: Do you think free trade agreements with other countries generally increase or decrease each of the following, or don’t make much difference either way?

subcomponents.tariffs3_a: The variety of products Americans buy at the store
subcomponents.tariffs3_b: Prices of products Americans buy at the store

freespeech.label: Security of Free Speech in America
freespeech.question: How secure do you think the right to freedom of speech is in America today?

group_therms_black_1.label: Feelings towards Black Americans
group_therms_black_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward Black Americans on a scale of 0 to 100?

group_therms_white_1.label: Feelings towards White Americans
group_therms_white_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward White Americans on a scale of 0 to 100?

group_therms_jewish_1.label: Feelings towards Jewish Americans
group_therms_jewish_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward Jewish Americans on a scale of 0 to 100?

group_therms_hispanic_1.label: Feelings towards Hispanic Americans
group_therms_hispanic_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward Hispanic Americans on a scale of 0 to 100?

group_therms_illegal_immigrants_1.label: Feelings towards Illegal Immigrants
group_therms_illegal_immigrants_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward illegal immigrants on a scale of 0 to 100?

group_therms_trans_1.label: Feelings towards Transgender People
group_therms_trans_1.question: How would you rate your feelings toward Transgender people on a scale of 0 to 100?
